capabilities.description: Download-provider API for Anna's Archive style search, fetch, and request forwarding.
Forwards ebook request_submitted events to Anna's Archive download jobs.
Request/download provider backed by an Anna's Archive download service; not a presentation library source.
Polls the upstream Anna's Archive download service for status changes on non-terminal downloads.

global_config_schema.title: Postgres connection string
global_config_schema.description: DSN for the dedicated Anna's Archive downloader schema.

global_config_schema.title: Anna's Archive downloader base URL
global_config_schema.description: Base URL for the upstream downloader service, e.g. https://downloads.example.com (no trailing slash).

global_config_schema.title: Downloader API key
global_config_schema.description: X-API-Key header for upstream calls.

global_config_schema.title: External source priority (ordered list)
global_config_schema.description: JSON array — ordered indexer list passed to the upstream downloader external_search endpoint.

capabilities.description: Routes request events to a registered Radarr/Sonarr based on rules.
Polls registered *arrs for download/import progress.
Admin SPA for the Arr Request Router plugin.
Routes requests to one of N registered Radarr/Sonarr instances based on rules.

global_config_schema.title: Postgres connection string
global_config_schema.description: DSN for the dedicated arrouter schema (e.g. postgres://plugin_arrouter:...@host:5432/continuum?search_path=arrouter&sslmode=disable).

global_config_schema.title: TMDB API key
global_config_schema.description: TMDB v3 API key. Used for rule enrichment (genres, keywords, content rating, etc.).

global_config_schema.title: TMDB language
global_config_schema.description: TMDB language query param for enrichment lookups. Defaults to en-US.

global_config_schema.title: Poll interval (seconds)
global_config_schema.description: How often the poll loop checks each registered *arr. Minimum 10, maximum 600. Defaults to 30.

global_config_schema.title: Stale after (hours)
global_config_schema.description: Mark requests stuck in submitted/downloading as failed after this many hours. Defaults to 72.

global_config_schema.title: Secret encryption key
global_config_schema.description: Symmetric key (any non-empty string) used to encrypt registered_arr.api_key at rest. Rotating this key invalidates all stored API keys.

capabilities.description: Forwards continuum.requests submissions and cancellations to the Arr Proxy backend (movies → Radarr, TV → Sonarr).
Polls Radarr/Sonarr for download/import status and publishes transitions.
Read-only status board with retry for failed submissions.
Forwards approved requests to a single Arr Proxy backend that fronts both Radarr (movies) and Sonarr (TV) via path-routing.

global_config_schema.title: Postgres connection string
global_config_schema.description: DSN for the dedicated arrproxy schema (e.g. postgres://plugin_arrproxy:...@host:5432/continuum?search_path=arrproxy&sslmode=disable).

global_config_schema.title: Arr Proxy base URL
global_config_schema.description: The single backend URL fronting both Radarr and Sonarr via path-routing (e.g. http://arrproxy:9696). arrproxy appends /radarr/api/v3/... and /sonarr/api/v3/... internally.

global_config_schema.title: API key
global_config_schema.description: Shared API key for the Arr Proxy backend.

global_config_schema.title: Movies root folder
global_config_schema.description: Radarr-side root folder path (e.g. /movies).

global_config_schema.title: TV root folder
global_config_schema.description: Sonarr-side root folder path (e.g. /tv).

global_config_schema.title: Quality profile ID
global_config_schema.description: Quality profile ID for both Radarr and Sonarr (blank = first available).

global_config_schema.title: Language profile ID (Sonarr only)
global_config_schema.description: Sonarr-only; blank = first available.

global_config_schema.title: Polling
global_config_schema.description: How often to poll *arr and when to give up on stuck submissions.

capabilities.description: Request-provider API for scored AudiobookBay search, magnet resolution, diagnostics, and optional qBittorrent enqueueing.
Forwards audiobook request_submitted events to AudiobookBay search and the configured download mode.
Scraper-based audiobook request provider backed by AudiobookBay with optional qBittorrent enqueueing; not a presentation library source.
Polls embedded/qBittorrent download status for non-terminal audiobook requests.

global_config_schema.title: Postgres connection string
global_config_schema.description: DSN for the dedicated AudiobookBay requests schema.

global_config_schema.title: AudiobookBay base URL
global_config_schema.description: AudiobookBay base URL, e.g. https://audiobookbay.lu (no trailing slash).

global_config_schema.title: Download mode
global_config_schema.description: One of scrape_only, qbittorrent, or embedded. Defaults to qbittorrent when qBittorrent URL is set, otherwise scrape_only.

global_config_schema.title: qBittorrent Web UI URL
global_config_schema.description: Optional base URL for qBittorrent Web API, e.g. http://qbittorrent:8080. Leave blank for scrape-only magnet resolution.

global_config_schema.title: qBittorrent category
global_config_schema.description: Optional category assigned to enqueued audiobook torrents.

global_config_schema.title: qBittorrent save path
global_config_schema.description: Optional save path sent to qBittorrent for new audiobook requests.

global_config_schema.title: Embedded download directory
global_config_schema.description: Required when download_mode is embedded. Completed torrent files are written here.

global_config_schema.title: Embedded torrent listen port
global_config_schema.description: Optional BitTorrent listen port for embedded mode. Leave blank/0 for a random port.

global_config_schema.title: Fallback trackers
global_config_schema.description: JSON array of trackers used when AudiobookBay exposes an info hash without a full magnet URI.

capabilities.description: Customer-facing audiobook browser, player, request flow, and ABS-mobile API.
Tracks request fulfillment and import status from configured audiobook backends.
Polls backend for missed status events; closes idle ABS sessions; LRU-evicts cached audio.

global_config_schema.title: Postgres connection string
global_config_schema.description: DSN for the dedicated audiobooks schema (e.g. postgres://plugin_audiobooks:...@host:5432/continuum?search_path=audiobooks&sslmode=disable).

global_config_schema.title: Standalone HTTP listen address
global_config_schema.description: Optional. When set (e.g. ':7878' or '127.0.0.1:7878'), the plugin serves its HTTP routes directly on this address so operators can reverse-proxy a hostname (e.g. abs.example.com) to it. Protected SPA routes still require a Continuum session and will 401 here; public client-app routes (ABS API, /ping, /login) work normally. Changing this value requires a plugin restart. Leave empty to disable.

global_config_schema.title: Audiobooks CDN hostname
global_config_schema.description: Optional. When set together with cdn_signing_secret, the portal emits presigned-URL track URLs pointing at this hostname (e.g. 'audiobooks-cdn.example.com'). The hostname must reverse-proxy to the local audiobooks plugin's standalone HTTP listener. Leave both unset to keep the current proxy-through-portal behavior.

global_config_schema.title: Audiobooks CDN signing secret
global_config_schema.description: 32-byte base64-encoded HMAC secret shared with the local audiobooks plugin's stream_signing_secret. The same value goes in both plugins. Click 'Generate' in the admin UI to create a new one. The portal stores this in plain form (it needs the plaintext to sign JWTs); rotate by regenerating and updating both plugins.

capabilities.description: Catalog, streaming, and request forwarding to a BookWarehouse instance.
Catalog, cover, streaming, and request source for the Audiobooks portal.
Forwards audiobook request_submitted events to BookWarehouse monitoring.

global_config_schema.title: Postgres connection string
global_config_schema.description: DSN for the dedicated bookwarehouse_audio schema (e.g. postgres://plugin_bookwarehouse_audio:...@host:5432/continuum?search_path=bookwarehouse_audio&sslmode=disable).

global_config_schema.title: BookWarehouse base URL
global_config_schema.description: e.g. https://bookwarehouse.example.com (no trailing slash).

global_config_schema.title: BookWarehouse API key
global_config_schema.description: X-API-Key header for upstream calls.

global_config_schema.title: Default cover size
global_config_schema.description: One of small|medium|large|original. Defaults to large.

global_config_schema.title: Request quality profile
global_config_schema.description: BookWarehouse-side quality tier for new requests; leave blank for default.

global_config_schema.title: Direct local file streaming
global_config_schema.description: When enabled, stream audiobook files from local filesystem mounts using path remapping before falling back to Book Warehouse redirects.

global_config_schema.title: Audiobook path remappings
global_config_schema.description: JSON array mapping Book Warehouse paths to paths mounted inside Continuum, e.g. [{"source_path":"/media/books","target_path":"/mnt/books"}]. First matching rule wins.

capabilities.description: Calibre-backed ebook source: catalog, file streaming, request forwarding.
Forwards ebook request_submitted events to Book Warehouse monitoring.
Owned-library ebook source backed by an external Book Warehouse instance.
Polls upstream Book Warehouse for status changes on non-terminal requests.

global_config_schema.title: Postgres connection string
global_config_schema.description: DSN for the dedicated bookwarehouse_ebook schema (e.g. postgres://plugin_bookwarehouse_ebook:...@host:5432/continuum?search_path=bookwarehouse_ebook&sslmode=disable).

global_config_schema.title: Book Warehouse base URL
global_config_schema.description: e.g. https://bookwarehouse.example.com (no trailing slash).

global_config_schema.title: Book Warehouse API key
global_config_schema.description: X-API-Key header for upstream calls.

global_config_schema.title: Default cover size
global_config_schema.description: One of small|medium|large|original. Defaults to large.

global_config_schema.title: Request quality profile
global_config_schema.description: BookWarehouse-side quality tier for new requests.

global_config_schema.title: Enable auto-monitoring
global_config_schema.description: Allow Sonarr-style auto-monitoring for new requests (book is searched until found).

capabilities.description: Customer-facing ebooks portal: SPA + OPDS + KOReader kosync + Kobo + Kindle send + admin.

global_config_schema.title: Postgres connection string
global_config_schema.description: DSN for the dedicated ebooks schema.

global_config_schema.title: Cache directory
global_config_schema.description: Local directory for ebook file cache.

global_config_schema.title: Kindle SMTP config (JSON)
global_config_schema.description: {"host":"...","port":587,"username":"...","password":"...","from":"...","tls":"starttls"}

global_config_schema.title: Default download provider
global_config_schema.description: Plugin install id of the request/download provider to use by default.

global_config_schema.title: Default download provider installation
global_config_schema.description: Optional installed instance ID for the default provider. When empty, the provider plugin ID is used.

global_config_schema.title: Standalone HTTP listen address
global_config_schema.description: Optional. When set (e.g. ':7878' or '127.0.0.1:7878'), the plugin serves its HTTP routes directly on this address so operators can reverse-proxy a hostname (e.g. ebooks.example.com) to it. Public client-app routes (OPDS, kosync, Kobo, Kindle inbound) work normally there; protected SPA routes 401 (no Continuum session). Changing this requires a plugin restart. Leave empty to disable.

capabilities.description: Temporary public links for tightly scoped media access.
Prunes old guest-pass audit events.

global_config_schema.title: Postgres connection string
global_config_schema.description: DSN for the dedicated guest_pass schema (e.g. postgres://plugin_guest_pass:...@host:5432/continuum?search_path=guest_pass&sslmode=disable).

global_config_schema.title: Public base URL
global_config_schema.description: Optional absolute URL used when returning share links. Leave empty to return relative plugin URLs.

global_config_schema.title: Audit retention days
global_config_schema.description: How long to retain guest-pass event rows after creation. Defaults to 180.

capabilities.description: Scans local audiobook libraries and exposes them to the Audiobooks portal.
Searches Audnexus, AudiMeta, iTunes, Storytel, BookBeat, Audioteka, and Audiobookcovers.

global_config_schema.title: Postgres connection string
global_config_schema.description: DSN for the dedicated local_audiobooks schema.

global_config_schema.title: Library root paths
global_config_schema.description: Absolute filesystem paths to scan for .m4b files. JSON array of strings, e.g. ["/srv/audiobooks"].

global_config_schema.title: Standalone HTTP listen address
global_config_schema.description: Optional. Bind a TCP listener (e.g. ':7879' or '127.0.0.1:7879') for presigned-URL byte-range streaming. Requires stream_signing_secret. Leave empty to disable.

global_config_schema.title: Stream signing secret (HMAC)
global_config_schema.description: 32-byte base64-encoded shared secret with the audiobooks portal. Required when standalone_http_listen is set. Used to verify presigned stream URLs.

global_config_schema.title: Enabled metadata sources
global_config_schema.description: JSON array of source IDs to query. Defaults to all sources.

global_config_schema.title: Default metadata region
global_config_schema.description: ISO country code used when no per-request region is supplied. Defaults to "us".

global_config_schema.title: Metadata cache TTL (days)
global_config_schema.description: Number of days a positive metadata cache entry is retained. Defaults to 30.

global_config_schema.title: Metadata source rate limit (RPS)
global_config_schema.description: Per-source requests-per-second budget for the aggregator. Defaults to 5.

global_config_schema.title: Inline enrichment on scan
global_config_schema.description: When true, metadata enrichment runs synchronously after each library scan completes. Defaults to false.

global_config_schema.title: Scan enrichment source
global_config_schema.description: Source ID used by the enrichment worker during scans. Defaults to "audnexus".

capabilities.description: Scans local ebook, document, and future comic libraries and exposes them to the Ebooks portal.
Searches OpenLibrary, GoogleBooks, ISBNdb, Hardcover, Goodreads, Amazon, Anna's Archive, Project Gutenberg, BookBrainz, FantasticFiction, ISFDB, LibraryThing, Internet Archive, WorldCat, and Douban.

global_config_schema.title: Postgres connection string
global_config_schema.description: DSN for the dedicated Local Ebooks schema.

global_config_schema.title: Library root paths
global_config_schema.description: Absolute filesystem paths to scan. Use strings for legacy config, or objects with path/name/media_type for multiple libraries, e.g. [{"path":"/srv/ebooks","name":"Books","media_type":"book"},{"path":"/srv/comics","name":"Comics","media_type":"comics"}].

fields.label: JSON array of paths or library objects

global_config_schema.title: Standalone HTTP listen address
global_config_schema.description: Optional. Bind a TCP listener (e.g. ':7880' or '127.0.0.1:7880') for direct catalog access. Leave empty to disable.

global_config_schema.title: Stream signing secret (HMAC)
global_config_schema.description: 32-byte base64-encoded shared secret used to sign presigned download URLs. Reserved for future use.

global_config_schema.title: Enabled metadata sources
global_config_schema.description: JSON array of source IDs to query. Defaults to all sources.

global_config_schema.title: Default metadata region
global_config_schema.description: ISO country code used when no per-request region is supplied. Defaults to "us".

global_config_schema.title: Metadata cache TTL (days)
global_config_schema.description: Number of days a positive metadata cache entry is retained. Defaults to 30.

global_config_schema.title: Metadata source rate limit (RPS)
global_config_schema.description: Per-source requests-per-second budget for the aggregator. Defaults to 5.

global_config_schema.title: Inline enrichment on scan
global_config_schema.description: When true, metadata enrichment runs synchronously after each library scan completes. Defaults to false.

global_config_schema.title: Scan enrichment source
global_config_schema.description: Source ID used by the enrichment worker during scans. Defaults to "openlibrary".

global_config_schema.title: Google Books API key
global_config_schema.description: Optional API key for the Google Books metadata source.

global_config_schema.title: ISBNdb API key
global_config_schema.description: Optional API key for the ISBNdb metadata source.

global_config_schema.title: Hardcover API key
global_config_schema.description: Optional API key for the Hardcover metadata source.

capabilities.description: Receives Continuum and plugin events, applies rules, and queues outbound notifications.
Retries queued or failed notification deliveries.
Admin UI for targets, rules, provider settings, delivery audit, retries, and test sends.

global_config_schema.title: Notifications connection
global_config_schema.description: Postgres DSN for the dedicated notifications schema.

capabilities.description: Generic OIDC authentication. Multi-instance: install once per IdP.
Visual editors for claim filters and role mapping.

global_config_schema.title: Issuer URL
global_config_schema.description: OIDC issuer URL, e.g. https://auth.example.com. Discovery resolves <issuer>/.well-known/openid-configuration.

global_config_schema.title: Scopes
global_config_schema.description: Space-separated. Default: openid profile email.

global_config_schema.title: Display name
global_config_schema.description: Login button label. Configurable per install for multi-IdP setups.

global_config_schema.title: Icon
global_config_schema.description: Bundled icon filename (e.g., authentik.svg). Managed via /admin SPA.

global_config_schema.title: Claim filters
global_config_schema.description: JSON array of {claim_path, operator, value}. Managed via /admin SPA.

global_config_schema.title: Claim role mapping
global_config_schema.description: JSON array of {claim_path, operator, value, role}. Managed via /admin SPA.

global_config_schema.title: Require verified email
global_config_schema.description: If true, reject id_tokens with email_verified=false. Default: true.

global_config_schema.title: Auto-link by email
global_config_schema.description: If true, on email collision auto-link to existing continuum user. Otherwise show confirmation page (safer). Default: false.

capabilities.description: Public advertising page with stats, embedded HTML, and signed-token catalog browsing.

global_config_schema.title: Catalog token secret
global_config_schema.description: Required HMAC secret for signing public catalog access links. Use at least 32 random bytes.

global_config_schema.title: Standalone HTTP listen address
global_config_schema.description: Optional public listener address, e.g. 127.0.0.1:8090 or :8090. Prefer loopback behind a reverse proxy.

global_config_schema.title: Public base URL
global_config_schema.description: Optional absolute URL used when generated catalog links are returned.

global_config_schema.title: Embedded advertising HTML
global_config_schema.description: HTML rendered on the public landing page.

global_config_schema.title: Catalog token TTL hours
global_config_schema.description: Default generated catalog link lifetime. Defaults to 168.

global_config_schema.title: Ebook portal installation ID
global_config_schema.description: Optional Continuum plugin installation ID for continuum.ebooks. Enables ebook stats and browsing through authenticated inter-plugin HTTP.

global_config_schema.title: Audiobook portal installation ID
global_config_schema.description: Optional Continuum plugin installation ID for continuum.audiobooks. Enables audiobook stats and browsing through authenticated inter-plugin HTTP.

capabilities.description: User-submitted media requests with approval workflow.
Tracks request status from library scans and from the configured router plugin.

global_config_schema.title: Postgres connection string
global_config_schema.description: DSN for the dedicated requests schema (e.g. postgres://plugin_requests:...@host:5432/continuum?search_path=requests&sslmode=disable).

global_config_schema.title: TMDB API key (override)
global_config_schema.description: TMDB v3 API key. Optional — the plugin embeds a default project key (same as continuum.tmdb), so leave this empty unless you want to use your own.

global_config_schema.title: Legacy webhook URL for state-change notifications
global_config_schema.description: Optional compatibility path. When set, the plugin POSTs a JSON payload to this URL on approve / deny / cancel transitions. Prefer continuum.notifications for queued multi-target delivery. Best-effort delivery with 3 retries; leave empty to disable.

global_config_schema.title: Per-user monthly quotas
global_config_schema.description: Defaults applied to every non-admin user.

capabilities.description: Dashboard for Continuum active streams, playback history, map coverage, and globe view.
Copies Continuum playback history into the plugin schema and applies retention.

global_config_schema.title: Plugin database
global_config_schema.description: Postgres DSN for the plugin-owned stream_dashboard schema.

global_config_schema.title: Continuum source database
global_config_schema.description: Read-only Postgres DSN for Continuum's public schema. Used to sync active sessions and playback history into the plugin schema.

global_config_schema.title: Stream Dashboard settings
global_config_schema.description: Dashboard refresh, retention, and GeoIP enrichment settings.

capabilities.description: OAuth/OIDC auth against a WHMCS billing system.
Admin SPA for configuring allowed products.

global_config_schema.title: WHMCS server URL
global_config_schema.description: Base URL of the WHMCS install (e.g. https://billing.example.com). No trailing slash.

global_config_schema.title: Login button label
global_config_schema.description: Text shown for this provider on the Continuum login screen. Leave empty to use the default manifest label.

global_config_schema.title: Allowed WHMCS products
global_config_schema.description: Managed via the plugin /admin SPA. On-disk format: comma-separated product IDs. If empty, all WHMCS accounts are allowed.

global_config_schema.title: WHMCS admin API identifier
global_config_schema.description: Required for product gating and Discord ID fetch.

global_config_schema.title: Fetch Discord ID from WHMCS
global_config_schema.description: If true, the plugin reads a WHMCS custom field on login and includes the value as the discord_id claim.

global_config_schema.title: Discord ID custom field name
global_config_schema.description: Name of the WHMCS client custom field that stores the Discord ID. Defaults to 'Discord ID'.

global_config_schema.title: Claim role mapping
global_config_schema.description: Array of {product_id, role} entries. Role is 'user' or 'admin'. After every successful login, the host applies the highest-matched role.
